creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Bartek Jasicki from comment #2)

Thanks for your hard work!
Builds/working without unknown issue for me on working environment.
(Using ports-mgmt/pkg_replace as root.)

But unfortunately, poudriere build fails on staging as below.
